title: Rethinking the ROI of cybersecurity
summary: IBM Technology argues that security spending should not impede innovation. The video advocates for strategic risk thinking that balances security protection with business growth and speed to market.
writeup: IBM Technology reframes how cybersecurity spending is evaluated, arguing that security investment should not slow innovation. The video makes the case for strategic risk thinking that weighs security protection against business growth and speed to market. The takeaway: rather than treating security as a pure cost or a brake, organizations can use risk assessment to balance protection with the pace of delivering products.
